summary: Iteration 90 - Testing News Headlines, Decision Engine impact_primary, Layout navigation filtering, and Xplan Sync features. All 12 backend tests passed. Frontend features verified: MacroDashboard Financial News section working with headlines from multiple sources, XplanSyncIndicator visible at bottom right, ScenarioModelling goal save triggers Xplan sync.

issues: Compliance modal (Important Information) appears on every page load - requires checkbox acknowledgment. This is expected behavior for financial compliance.

critical_code_review_comments: PASS: GET /api/news/headlines returns news with headlines, summaries, links from multiple sources (CNBC, WSJ, FT, AFR, Economist, etc.)
PASS: GET /api/news/sources returns list of 9 available news sources with id, name, category
PASS: GET /api/news/categories returns list of news categories
PASS: POST /api/decision-engine/recommendations-v2 returns recommendations with impact_primary as numeric values
PASS: POST /api/decision-engine/health-score-v2 returns health score with grade and component scores
PASS: POST /api/xplan/enable-demo enables demo mode successfully
PASS: GET /api/xplan/status shows connected=true, mode=demo after enabling demo
PASS: POST /api/xplan/push works in demo mode for strategy data type
PASS: MacroDashboard displays Financial News section with headlines from The Economist and other sources
PASS: XplanSyncIndicator visible at bottom right showing 'Xplan Demo' connection status
PASS: Layout.jsx getActiveNavGroups() returns clientContextNav (without Dashboard/CRM) when selectedClient is truthy in Adviser mode
PASS: ScenarioModelling.jsx saveGoal() calls triggerSync('strategy', ...) to trigger Xplan sync notification
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 90 verified: 1) News headlines API working with RSS feeds from 9 financial sources (CNBC, WSJ, FT, AFR, Economist, Reuters, Bloomberg, Yahoo Finance, MarketWatch) with 10-minute caching. 2) Decision Engine recommendations-v2 includes impact_primary numeric field. 3) Layout.jsx correctly filters navigation to show only clientContextNav when client is selected in Adviser mode. 4) XplanSyncIndicator shows at bottom right when Xplan is connected. 5) ScenarioModelling goal save triggers Xplan sync via triggerSync().

mocked_apis_list: News headlines use RSS feeds with fallback to static data if feeds fail
Xplan API in demo mode - uses XplanAPIClient demo methods

decision_engine_recommendations.impact_primary_field: numeric value present in all recommendations

features: Financial News section with Newspaper icon

layout_navigation_filtering.behavior: When selectedClient is truthy in Adviser mode, getActiveNavGroups() returns clientContextNav which excludes Dashboard and CRM groups

xplan_sync_indicator.shows: Xplan Demo when connected in demo mode

scenario_modelling_xplan_sync.behavior: saveGoal() calls triggerSync('strategy', {...}) to trigger Xplan sync notification
